Bus Timings

Abu Hail Clinic 1 Bus Stop in Dubai: Route and Stop Details

September 24, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The Abu Hail, Clinic 1 Bus Stop is a crucial transit hub situated in the lively Deira district of Dubai. This strategically located stop offers vital connections to various parts of the city, making it an essential part of Dubai’s public transportation network. Its proximity to local landmarks, shopping centers, and healthcare facilities ensures that it serves as a key gateway for both daily commuters and visitors exploring the area.

Address

Deira Dubai United Arab Emirates

Map

View Google directions here.

The Abu Hail, Clinic 1 Bus Stop is well-integrated into Dubai’s public transportation system, connecting passengers to multiple bus routes that serve the surrounding neighborhoods and key destinations. Its location makes it a convenient access point for essential services and attractions in the Deira area.

Bus Routes and Timings

The Abu Hail, Clinic 1 Bus Stop is serviced by several bus routes with regular intervals throughout the day:

Bus Route Destination Timings
23 Oud Metha Bus Station - Al Nahda 1 Every 20 minutes from 5:00 AM to 11:00 PM
64 Gold Souq Bus Station - Ras Al Khor Every 30 minutes from 5:15 AM to 10:45 PM
13B Gold Souq Bus Station - Al Qusais Bus Station Every 30 minutes from 5:30 AM to 10:30 PM
13D Gold Souq Bus Station - Al Qusais Bus Station Every 30 minutes from 5:45 AM to 10:45 PM
C18 Shaikh Rashid Colony - Oud Metha Bus Station Every 40 minutes from 6:00 AM to 11:00 PM
X13 Lulu Village - Al Satwa Bus Station Every 30 minutes from 5:45 AM to 11:15 PM
E303 Union Bus Station - Al Jubail Bus Station Every 40 minutes from 6:00 AM to 10:30 PM

Bus Route Details

The Abu Hail, Clinic 1 Bus Stop is well-connected by a variety of bus routes, each serving different key destinations:

  • Bus Route 23: This route connects Abu Hail with Oud Metha Bus Station and Al Nahda 1, offering frequent services every 20 minutes from 5:00 AM to 11:00 PM. It provides essential connectivity for travelers heading to and from these busy areas.

  • Bus Route 64: Running between Gold Souq Bus Station and Ras Al Khor, the 64 route operates every 30 minutes from 5:15 AM to 10:45 PM. It is a reliable option for those traveling between these commercial and residential areas.
  • Bus Route 13B: Serving the Gold Souq Bus Station and Al Qusais Bus Station, this route runs every 30 minutes from 5:30 AM to 10:30 PM. It facilitates movement between two major transit points in Dubai.
  • Bus Route 13D: Similar to 13B, the 13D route also connects Gold Souq Bus Station with Al Qusais Bus Station, with departures every 30 minutes from 5:45 AM to 10:45 PM. This provides additional frequency for those traveling to Al Qusais.
  • Bus Route C18: This route links Shaikh Rashid Colony with Oud Metha Bus Station, operating every 40 minutes from 6:00 AM to 11:00 PM.
  • Bus Route X13: Connecting Lulu Village with Al Satwa Bus Station, the X13 route runs every 30 minutes from 5:45 AM to 11:15 PM.
  • Bus Route E303: Offering a link between Union Bus Station and Al Jubail Bus Station, the E303 operates every 40 minutes from 6:00 AM to 10:30 PM. This route provides an important connection for longer journeys across the city.

Each of these routes contributes to the efficient operation of Dubai’s public transport network, ensuring that passengers have access to various destinations throughout the day.

Nearby Destinations

The Abu Hail, Clinic 1 Bus Stop is surrounded by various amenities and landmarks that enhance its appeal as a key transit point:

Restaurants

  • Community Restaurant: Offers a variety of local and international dishes.
Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE
  • Nearby Landmarks
  • Union Coop Hamriya: A large shopping center with diverse retail options.
  • Friday Market: A bustling market known for its wide range of goods.
  • Al Hamriya Park: A popular park ideal for relaxation and outdoor activities.
  • EPPCO: A well-known gas station with additional convenience services.

Healthcare Facilities

  • Abu Hail Clinic: Provides general medical services and specialist care.

  • Miracle Home Healthcare: Offers in-home healthcare services.
  • Al Tower Healthcare: A healthcare facility with various medical services.
  • NMC Deira: A comprehensive healthcare center with multiple specialties.

Shopping Centers

  • Al Hamriya Shopping Centre: A local shopping center with various retail outlets.

  • Talal Market Hor Al Anz: A neighborhood market offering everyday essentials.
  • Union Coop Abu Hail Hypermarket: A large hypermarket for grocery and household needs.

Pharmacies

  • My Patient Pharmacy: Offers prescription medications and health products.

  • Life Pharmacy Grand Life: Provides a wide range of pharmaceuticals and healthcare items.
  • Rotana Pharmacy Hor Al Anz Street: Known for its extensive selection of medicines.
  • Al Mouheba Pharmacy: Offers various pharmaceutical and health-related products.

Nearby Stops

  1. Abu Hail, Clinic 2(20m): 5, 13B, 13D, 23, 64, C03, C18, E303, X13

  2. Hor Al Anz 5(155m): 5, C03

  3. Abu Hail, Eppco(243m): 5, C03

  4. Hor Al Anz Street(264m): 5, C03

  5. Majid English School 2(276m): C03, C28

The Abu Hail, Clinic 1 Bus Stop is more than just a transit point; it is a vital component of the Deira area’s public transportation infrastructure. Its strategic location, frequent bus services, and proximity to key amenities and services make it an essential stop for anyone navigating Dubai. Whether you’re commuting for work, heading to nearby shopping centers, or accessing local healthcare facilities, this bus stop offers a convenient and efficient way to travel across the city.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
